ACM-W NITK

Association For Computing Machinery - Women

Discover Events
About Us

ACM-W Is An International Organization Which Supports And Empowers Women In All Aspects Of The Computing Field. ACM-W NITK Is A Thriving Student Chapter That Was Incepted In The Summer Of 2019. We At ACM-W, NITK Chapter Wish To Inspire And Nurture Young Minds To Step Up And Make A Mark In The Universe Of Technology. Our Aim Is To Promote Learning And Create A Workspace Where The Ideas Of Young Women Can Take Shape And Build The Future. From Providing A Wide Range Of Opportunities, To Working In A Larger Community To Advance Contributions By Creative Minds, ACM-W NITK Aims To Be A Stepping Stone For Women To Be Celebrated And Create A Difference.

Get Involved

Discover Opportunities

Join ACM-W To Make A Difference And Get Your Ideas Sculpted Into Reality. From Multiple Scholarships, To Competitions And Prestigious Conferences. We've Curated Them All! Click Here For More

Events

ACM-W Aims At Holding Events In Order To Empower Women In Various Fields Of Technology Whether It's In A Classroom Or A Boardroom. Our Events Are Carefully Curated For The Education And Advancement Of Women In The Technical Sphere. Click Here For More

Mentorship Programme

A Program To Encourage Senior-Junior Interaction, Help Them With Academics, Career Planning, Research Opportunities And To Explore New Fields. Click Here For More

Frequently Asked Questions

Facebook

At ACM-W We're All Ears. Feel Free To Drop In Your Feedback Or Suggestions, We'd Love To Hear From You. Leave Us A Mail Or Connect With Us On Our Social Media Accounts.
